body:
## Summary

This PR adds support for the **Gemini CLI** tool as a third AI tool option alongside Claude and OpenCode, implementing JSON output format support for structured data exchange.

## Changes

### New Files
- **`src/gemini.lib.mjs`**: Core Gemini integration module
  - Connection validation with retry logic
  - Command execution with JSON output parsing
  - Uncommitted changes detection and handling
  - Model ID mapping (flash, pro, thinking)
  
- **`src/gemini.prompts.lib.mjs`**: Prompt building utilities
  - User prompt builder with issue/PR context
  - System prompt builder with guidelines
  - Thinking instruction support

### Modified Files
- **`src/solve.config.lib.mjs`**:
  - Added `gemini` to tool choices
  - Added model descriptions for gemini models
  - Set default model to `flash` for gemini tool
  
- **`src/config.lib.mjs`**:
  - Added `geminiCli` timeout configuration
  - Configurable via `HIVE_MIND_GEMINI_TIMEOUT_SECONDS` env var
  
- **`src/solve.validation.lib.mjs`**:
  - Added gemini connection validation
  - Integrated into system checks workflow
  
- **`src/solve.mjs`**:
  - Added gemini tool execution path
  - Added tool-specific uncommitted changes handler

## Features

✅ **Model Support**:
- `flash` (default): gemini-2.0-flash-exp
- `pro`: gemini-2.0-pro-exp
- `thinking`: gemini-2.0-flash-thinking-exp

✅ **JSON Output Format**: Prefers JSON output when available for structured data processing

✅ **Connection Validation**: Tests gemini CLI before execution to ensure proper authentication

✅ **Error Handling**: Includes detailed error messages for common issues (auth, project ID, etc.)

✅ **Timeout Configuration**: Customizable timeout via environment variable

## Usage

```bash
# Use gemini with default model (flash)
./src/solve.mjs <issue-url> --tool gemini

# Use specific gemini model
./src/solve.mjs <issue-url> --tool gemini --model pro

# Set custom timeout (in seconds)
HIVE_MIND_GEMINI_TIMEOUT_SECONDS=120 ./src/solve.mjs <issue-url> --tool gemini
```

## Testing

- ✅ Verified gemini tool appears in `--help` output
- ✅ Confirmed tool choice validation works correctly
- ✅ Tested model alias mapping (flash, pro, thinking)
- ✅ Validated JSON output format support

## Notes

- The implementation follows the same patterns as existing claude and opencode tools
- Gemini CLI does not support session resume functionality (unlike Claude CLI)
- JSON output format is used for better error detection and structured data handling

Fixes #516

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

commits.messageBody:
This commit adds support for the Gemini CLI tool as a third AI tool option
alongside Claude and OpenCode, with JSON output format support.

Changes:
- Created src/gemini.lib.mjs with connection validation, command execution,
  and uncommitted changes handling
- Created src/gemini.prompts.lib.mjs with user and system prompt builders
- Updated src/solve.config.lib.mjs to add gemini to tool choices with
  default model 'flash'
- Updated src/config.lib.mjs to add geminiCli timeout configuration
- Updated src/solve.validation.lib.mjs to add gemini tool validation
- Integrated gemini into src/solve.mjs workflow for tool execution

The implementation follows the same patterns as the existing claude and
opencode tools, supporting:
- Model aliases (flash, pro, thinking)
- JSON output format for structured data
- Timeout configuration via HIVE_MIND_GEMINI_TIMEOUT_SECONDS
- Connection validation before execution
- Error handling and retry logic

Fixes #516

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

title: Add support for gemini tool with JSON output format
